infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Helm to access your location to track outdoor runs.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow Helm to track your run route even when the screen is locked.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow Helm to track your run route even when the screen is locked.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Helm to access your photo library so you can attach progress photos to your tracking entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Helm to save progress photos you capture to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Helm to scan food barcodes for calorie tracking.
